specific_mechanism: YONEDA-EVAL: eval category + rubrics as representables + Hom evaluation + composition
llm_application: Treat each LLM as object in an evaluation category; rubric criteria as morphisms-out; the full evaluation = collection of responses across rubrics, sufficient to determine the LLM up to behavioral equivalence.
novelty_claim: Existing LLM-as-judge eval treats rubrics as criteria; categorical framework adds uniqueness via Yoneda.
